title: Pure UI
description: Simple and elegant resource pack UI
body:
# Pure UI
> Elegant and simple interface,it only modifies the Minecraft UI without altering any items or blocks.
> All containers are now supported
## Included textures
- Inventory
- Crafting table
- Furnace
- Chest
- Enchanting table
- Anvil
- Shulker box
- Recipe book
- Hotbar
- Buttons
- The font comes from the Resource-Han-Rounded open source font
  Used together with the `Modern UI` mod, the effect is even better
## Mod support
- `Create 6.0+`
- `EMI`
- `JEI`
- `Mod Menu`
- `Sophisticated Storage`
- `Sophisticated Backpacks`
- `Inventory Profiles Next`
- `Crafting Tweaks`
- Work in progress...

## Terms of Use:
<details>
  <summary>✅ Permitted Behaviors:</summary> 
  
### 🎥 Video/Livestream Usage
   - Can be directly used in **Minecraft-related videos, livestreams**, etc. **No prior authorization required**. 
### 📦 Modpack/Server
   - Allowed to include this texture pack **in full** in your modpack or server, **with source attribution**.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>🚫 Prohibited Behaviors:</summary> 
  
### 🚫 Texture pack integrations are non-existent. All "texture pack integrations" are unauthorized.
- **Modifying original texture files** (e.g., adjusting textures) in any form is prohibited.
- **Extracting any files** from this texture pack to mix with other texture packs is prohibited (including so-called "texture pack integration optimizations").

### 🚫 Redistribution Restrictions 
   - **Repackaging** this texture pack for redistribution (e.g., renaming the zip file, adding README files) is prohibited.
   - Prohibited from distributing this texture pack as part of your own work.
### 💰 Commercial Limitations
   - Use in **direct profit scenarios** (e.g., paid mods, paid servers) is prohibited. **Written authorization** is required even with source attribution.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>🔍 Additional Notes:</summary>
  
### Correct Examples
- ✔️ Include the original texture pack in your modpack and state the source in the CurseForge description.
- ✔️ Use this texture pack in YouTube videos with a title note: "Texture Pack: `[Pure UI
] by [Lintern]`
### Violation Warnings
- ❌ Prohibited: Mixing this texture pack's ore textures with another texture pack's terrain textures to create "XX Texture Pack Compatibility Edition."
- ❌ Prohibited: Offering "optimized/modified editions" on platforms like Afadian/Patreon (free or paid).
### Dispute Handling
- The author reserves the right to demand removal of violating content and may publicly disclose violator information in the community.
</details>
